config_files.line: To let our Twilio Phone number use the callback endpoint we exposed, our development server will need to be publicly accessible. [We recommend using ngrok to solve this problem](https://www.twilio.com/blog/2015/09/6-awesome-reasons-to-use-ngrok-when-testing-webhooks.html).

1. Provision a number under the [Manage Numbers page](https://www.twilio.com/user/account/phone-numbers/incoming) on your account. Set the voice URL for the number to `http://<your-ngrok-subdomain>.ngrok.io/ivr/welcome`.

notes: Standard TWILIO_* env vars are scanned above. Also search for non-standard names that may contain Twilio SIDs or phone numbers (e.g., ACCOUNT_SID, SMS_FROM, PHONE_NUMBER).
